description: Extract properties from a circle: center point, radius, diameter, circumference, and area. Also supports creating circles from standard-form and general-form equations.
utility: Extract circle properties or create a circle from an equation string

arguments.name: property type
arguments.description: The property to extract from the circle

alternates.description: Circle parsed from standard form equation, e.g. "(x-2)^2+(y-3)^2=25"
Circle parsed from general quadratic, e.g. "x^2+y^2-4x-6y-12=0"
Get the center of a circle as a point

examples.scenario: Circle from general-form equation for point position analysis (Point and Circle lesson)
Circle from general-form equation in diameter through center lesson
